summary: Comprehensive test suite with strong separation between unit tests (cleanup.test.ts) and integration tests (workflow.test.ts). All core policies, validation, and dry-run mode are tested. Strengths: excellent workflow integration via act, realistic fixtures, good helper functions (art(), runAct()), proper use of fixed NOW date for reproducibility. Gaps: CLI argument parsing lacks direct unit tests (only tested indirectly via integration); missing edge cases like 0-byte artifacts, maxTotalBytes=0, and maxAgeDays=0; file-not-found error in loadArtifactsFromFile not explicitly tested. Design is clean with logical grouping by feature, but workflow test setup has duplication. Tests would catch most regressions but may miss some CLI edge cases and boundary conditions.
